what_changed: Three invoices crossed 30 days overdue since the last check.
why_it_matters: Overdue receivables are the fastest lever on near-term cash position.

next_actions.label: Draft reminder emails for the 3 overdue invoices

explanation: Compared the current AR aging snapshot to the prior one; three invoices moved into the 30+ bucket. Proposed a reversible reminder action and flagged the irreversible payment action for approval.
